fn process_names(names: &[&str]) {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for name in names {
        results.push(*name);
    }
    println!("{:?}", results);
}

fn match_names(names: &[String], pattern: &str) -> Vec<&str> {
    let mut matched = Vec::new();
    for name in names {
        if name.contains(pattern) {
            matched.push(name.as_str());
        }
    }
    matched
}

fn collect_tags(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<&str> {
    items.iter().map(|item| item.tag.as_str()).collect()
}

fn format_entries(entries: &[Entry]) -> String {
    let mut output = String::new();
    for entry in entries {
        output.push_str(&entry.name);
        output.push('\n');
    }
    output
}

fn write_name(name: &str, buf: &mut String) {
    buf.push_str(name);
}

struct Item { tag: String }
struct Entry { name: String }
